indicator_text: Ability to listen actively to a variety of oral texts to gain information.
Ability to listen and participate actively in conversations in various settings for self-expression and effective communication.
Ability to speak accurately with expression and at the right speed, with minimum hesitation for fluency in communication.
Ability to read about 300 words fluently and accurately, at the right speed and with expression for effective communication.
Ability to read grade-appropriate visuals, print and digital texts for comprehension and information.
Ability to read a variety of grade-appropriate visual, digital and print texts for lifelong learning.
Ability to use grammatical forms to communicate ideas, opinions and emotions appropriately in different settings for effective communication.
Ability to use punctuation, paragraphing and spelling correctly for effective communication.
Ability to write a variety of writings using the correct formats for effective communication.
Ability to write creative works clearly and expressively for effective communication.
Kuweza kuwasiliana kwa matamshi bora (Matamshi ya sauti zinazokaribiana: p/b, t/d, k/g, ch/j)
Kuweza kuzungumza kwa ufasaha (Kwa kutumia maneno ya upole na mazungumzo ya kimikakati)
Kuweza kusikiliza na kujibu ipasavyo (Maamkizi na maagano, ushairi, masimulizi)
Kuweza kutumia lugha kiubunifu (Vitendawili, methali, nahau, visawe, tashbihi)
Kuweza kusoma kwa ufasaha (Ulumbi, umbo, wahusika, matumizi ya msamiati mwafaka, kutoa muhtasari)
Kuweza kusoma kwa kina. (Matumizi ya kamusi: mpangilio na maana za maneno)
Kuweza kusoma kwa ufasaha. (Matamshi bora, kiwango kifaaacho cha sauti, kasi ifaayo, ishara zifaazo)
Kuweza kusoma kwa mapana. (Kutambua na kuchagua matini ya kusoma, kutambua ujumbe na matumizi ya lugha)
Kuweza kusoma kidijitali. (Kufungua faili ya kidijitali, matumizi ya vifaa vya kidijitali, kukarakana kwenye tovuti, volumu, kuchagua na kusoma matini, kutambua ujumbe na matumizi ya lugha.)
Kuweza kuandika aina mbalimbali za insha (wasifu, masimulizi, maelezo na barua ya kirafiki) kwa kuzingatia vipengele vifuatavyo: muundo, ujumbe, mtindo na kanuni zifaazo za uandishi.
Kuweza kuandika kwa tarakilishi. (Sehemu za tarakilishi, kufungua na kufunga tarakilishi, kuhifadhi).
Kuweza kutambua na kutumia vinyume vya maneno na kuvitumia katika matini.
Kuweza kutambua na kutumia viambishi vya nyakati katika vitenzi. (Wakati uliopita, uliopo na ujao)
Kuweza kutambua maneno yaliyokanushwa, viambishi vya ukanushaji na kukanusha maneno ipasavyo. (Wakati uliopita, uliopo na ujao)
Kuweza kutambua na kutumia aina mbalimbali za maneno katika lugha ya Kiswahili. (Vitenzi, viwakilishi, vielezi, viunganishi, vihusishi na vihisishi)
Kuweza kutambua viambishi vya ngeli, nomino za ngeli na kutumia upatanisho wa kisarufi ipasavyo. (A-WA, U-I, KI-VI, LI-YA na LI-LI)
Kuweza kutambua na kutumia vitenzi katika kauli mbalimbali. (kauli ya kutenda, kutendea na kutendwa)
Ability to explain conservation of resources of four resources in the environment (soil, water, fuel, wild animals).
Ability to conserve four resources in the environment (soil, water, fuel, wild animals).
Ability to show four aspects of responsibility in conservation of environmental resources (offers leadership, observes safety, shows initiative, shows dutifulness in tasks).
Ability to describe food production processes at household level (direct sowing of seeds, growing of fruits, uses of domestic animals, balanced diet, boiling and shallow frying).
Ability to carry out various food production processes at household level (direct sowing of seeds, growing of fruits, uses of domestic animals, balanced diet, boiling and shallow frying).
Ability to exhibit integrity in carrying out food production processes (utilising resources prudently, is accountable, shows honesty, applies ethically acceptable procedures).
Ability to describe practices that promote hygiene (personal hygiene, domestic hygiene and cleaning personal protective equipment).
Ability to apply health practices to promote hygiene (personal hygiene, domestic hygiene and cleaning personal protective equipment).
Ability to exhibit responsibility while undertaking health practices that promote hygiene (respects other learners’ property, offers leadership, accepts consequences, cares for property).
Ability to use tacking stitches in making an item (makes appropriate choice of stitch, makes the stitch, ensures evenness of the stitch and firmness of stitch to the purpose).
Ability to work in unity in making an item (sharing resources, working in teams, appreciating efforts of others, respects others’ opinions).
Ability to identify characteristics of plants and animals.
Ability to describe functions of external parts of a plant.
Ability to identify parts of the human digestive system.
Ability to develop a plan of maintaining a healthy human digestive system.
Ability to describe the properties of the three states of matter.
Ability to manage solid waste in the environment.
Ability to outline the importance of conserving water at home and school.
Ability to demonstrate the effects of force on objects in nature.
Ability to identify sources of light in nature.
Ability to explain the use of light in day-to-day life.
Ability to demonstrate uses of heat in day-to-day life.
Ability to describe safety measures when using heat.
Ability to use place value and total value of numbers up to tens of thousands.
Ability to read and write numbers in symbols and words.
Ability to order and round off numbers up to 1000.
Ability to identify factors and multiples of numbers up to 50.
Ability to make patterns involving even and odd numbers up to 100.
Ability to represent Hindu Arabic numerals using Roman numerals up to 'X'.
Ability to add up to two 4-digit numbers with single and double regrouping.
Ability to create patterns involving addition, subtraction and multiplication.
Ability to subtract up to two 4-digit numbers with single and double regrouping.
Ability to multiply up to a two-digit number by a two-digit number with and without regrouping.
Ability to divide up to a two-digit number by a one-digit number with and without remainder.
Ability to identify different types of fractions.
Ability to convert improper fractions to mixed fractions and mixed fractions to improper fractions.
Ability to identify a tenth or a hundredth in a decimal number.
Ability to estimate and measure length in centimetres.
Ability to establish the relationship between metres and centimetres.
Ability to convert centimetres to metres and metres to centimetres.
Ability to add, subtract, multiply and divide length in centimetres and metres.
Ability to calculate the area of squares and rectangles as a product of number of rows and columns.
Ability to work out the volume of cubes and cuboids by piling blocks.
Ability to measure, add and subtract capacity in litres.
Ability to measure, add and subtract mass of different objects in kilograms.
Ability to read, tell and estimate time in a.m. and p.m.
Ability to work out addition and subtraction involving units of time.
Ability to convert shillings to cents and cents to shillings.
Ability to work out the total cost of items in the shopping list of not more than ten thousand shillings.
Ability to demonstrate a clockwise and an anti-clockwise turn in the environment.
Ability to demonstrate a quarter turn, half turn and full turn in the environment.
Ability to identify angles from the objects in the environment.
Ability to draw the shapes of rectangles, squares, triangles, circles and ovals.
Ability to make patterns using squares, rectangles and triangles.
Ability to identify properties of triangles, squares and rectangles.
Ability to identify and collect data of at most 10 items.
Ability to record and interpret the raw data from the table.
Ability to make right choices in day-to-day life
Ability to list three attributes of God
Ability to retell Bible stories
Ability to list lessons learnt from the Bible stories
Ability to apply lessons learnt from the Bible stories in daily life
Ability to retell the annunciation of the birth of Jesus Christ
Ability to retell the birth of John the Baptist
Ability to retell three miracles performed by Jesus Christ
Ability to list lessons learnt from the miracles of Jesus Christ
Ability to apply lessons learnt from the teachings of Jesus Christ in daily life
Ability to explain how Christian values enhance harmonious co-existence
Ability to apply acquired Christian values in day-to-day life
Ability to participate in church activities
Ability to list the 12 disciples of Jesus Christ
Ability to recite the Lord's Prayer and pray for others
Ability to utilise the fruit of the Holy Spirit in making right decisions
Ability to use social media responsibly

Ability to explain the basic meaning of the selected surahs
Ability to read the selected hadith
Ability to deduce the teachings from the selected hadith
Ability to identify and use the attributes of Allah in supplication
Ability to apply the virtues of the prophets in day-to-day life
Ability to perform swalah while adhering to all its rules
Ability to assess the significance of kindness to Allah's creatures and Islamic code of dressing and uphold positive use of media
Ability to describe the evils of begging
Ability to uphold obligations to family members
Ability to describe the events of Prophet's mission in Makkah
Ability to state water bodies that are considered sacred as mentioned in the Scriptures
Ability to identify the role of water in our daily lives
Ability to specify the names of plants that are considered sacred in each faith
Ability to identify the contributions of Enlightened Beings
Ability to implement teachings of Enlightened Beings
Ability to explain the lessons learnt from the Scriptures
Ability to apply the teachings of the Scriptures
Ability to recite prayers
Ability to identify prayers performed for different occasions
Ability to state the importance of integrity in their daily lives
Ability to identify elements of integrity among peers and in society
Ability to state all ideal practices of a passenger during boarding and alighting for safety
Ability to name the types of Pranayam
Ability to display simple body postures
Ability to identify Principles of Dharma according to Sanatan/Vedic
Ability to identify the rites and rituals during the celebration of different festivals
Ability to relate the days of the week with the corresponding planets
Ability to create and/or execute various Creative Arts tasks such as rhythmic patterns, drawings, paintings, Netball skills, montages, clay modelling, and simple melodies.
Ability to perform and/or display Creative Arts skills such as recorder melodies, photography techniques, athletic techniques, various songs, and aquatic or animal-based games.
Ability to display, critique, participate in, or analyse various Creative Arts items such as drawings, paintings, photographs, Kenyan folk arts, sports activities, and cultural expressions.
Ability to use the four cardinal points to give direction of places.
Ability to identify the main physical features in the county.
Ability to explain how the four seasons influence human activities in the county.
Ability to explain the importance of the main historic built environments in the county.

Ability to describe aspects of traditional culture in the county.

Ability to identify the projects that can be initiated at school.
Ability to identify qualities of good citizenship in school.
Ability to develop strategies of living in peace with others in school.

Ability to describe the functions of the Children’s Government in school.
Ability to demonstrate qualities of good leadership in the community.
Ability to explain the roles of a member of county assembly.

Kuweza kuwasiliana kwa matamshi bora (Matamshi ya sauti zinazokaribiana: p/b, t/d, k/g, ch/j)
Kuweza kuzungumza kwa ufasaha (Kwa kutumia maneno ya upole na mazungumzo ya kimikakati)
Kuweza kusikiliza na kujibu ipasavyo (Maamkizi na maagano, ushairi, masimulizi)
Kuweza kutumia lugha kiubunifu (Vitendawili, methali, nahau, visawe, tashbihi)
Kuweza kusoma kwa ufasaha (Ulumbi, umbo, wahusika, matumizi ya msamiati mwafaka, kutoa muhtasari)
Kuweza kusoma kwa kina. (Matumizi ya kamusi: mpangilio na maana za maneno)
Kuweza kusoma kwa ufasaha. (Matamshi bora, kiwango kifaaacho cha sauti, kasi ifaayo, ishara zifaazo)
Kuweza kusoma kwa mapana. (Kutambua na kuchagua matini ya kusoma, kutambua ujumbe na matumizi ya lugha)
Kuweza kusoma kidijitali. (Kufungua faili ya kidijitali, matumizi ya vifaa vya kidijitali, kukarakana kwenye tovuti, volumu, kuchagua na kusoma matini, kutambua ujumbe na matumizi ya lugha.)
Kuweza kuandika aina mbalimbali za insha (wasifu, masimulizi, maelezo na barua ya kirafiki) kwa kuzingatia vipengele vifuatavyo: muundo, ujumbe, mtindo na kanuni zifaazo za uandishi.
Kuweza kuandika kwa tarakilishi. (Sehemu za tarakilishi, kufungua na kufunga tarakilishi, kuhifadhi).
Kuweza kutambua na kutumia vinyume vya maneno na kuvitumia katika matini.
Kuweza kutambua na kutumia viambishi vya nyakati katika vitenzi. (Wakati uliopita, uliopo na ujao)
Kuweza kutambua maneno yaliyokanushwa, viambishi vya ukanushaji na kukanusha maneno ipasavyo. (Wakati uliopita, uliopo na ujao)

Kuweza kutambua viambishi vya ngeli, nomino za ngeli na kutumia upatanisho wa kisarufi ipasavyo. (A-WA, U-I, KI-VI, LI-YA na LI-LI)
Kuweza kutambua na kutumia vitenzi katika kauli mbalimbali. (kauli ya kutenda, kutendea na kutendwa)

Kuweza kutumia lugha kiubunifu (Vitendawili, methali, nahau, visawe, tashbihi)
Kuweza kusoma kwa ufasaha (Ulumbi, umbo, wahusika, matumizi ya msamiati mwafaka, kutoa muhtasari)
Kuweza kusoma kwa kina. (Matumizi ya kamusi: mpangilio na maana za maneno)
Kuweza kusoma kwa ufasaha. (Matamshi bora, kiwango kifaaacho cha sauti, kasi ifaayo, ishara zifaazo)
Kuweza kusoma kwa mapana. (Kutambua na kuchagua matini ya kusoma, kutambua ujumbe na matumizi ya lugha)
Kuweza kusoma kidijitali. (Kufungua faili ya kidijitali, matumizi ya vifaa vya kidijitali, kukarakana kwenye tovuti, volumu, kuchagua na kusoma matini, kutambua ujumbe na matumizi ya lugha.)
Kuweza kuandika aina mbalimbali za insha (wasifu, masimulizi, maelezo na barua ya kirafiki) kwa kuzingatia vipengele vifuatavyo: muundo, ujumbe, mtindo na kanuni zifaazo za uandishi.
Kuweza kuandika kwa tarakilishi. (Sehemu za tarakilishi, kufungua na kufunga tarakilishi, kuhifadhi).
Kuweza kutambua na kutumia vinyume vya maneno na kuvitumia katika matini.
Kuweza kutambua na kutumia viambishi vya nyakati katika vitenzi. (Wakati uliopita, uliopo na ujao)
Kuweza kutambua maneno yaliyokanushwa, viambishi vya ukanushaji na kukanusha maneno ipasavyo. (Wakati uliopita, uliopo na ujao)
Kuweza kutambua na kutumia aina mbalimbali za maneno katika lugha ya Kiswahili. (Vitenzi, viwakilishi, vielezi, viunganishi, vihusishi na vihisishi)
Kuweza kutambua viambishi vya ngeli, nomino za ngeli na kutumia upatanisho wa kisarufi ipasavyo. (A-WA, U-I, KI-VI, LI-YA na LI-LI)
Kuweza kutambua na kutumia vitenzi katika kauli mbalimbali. (kauli ya kutenda, kutendea na kutendwa)
Ability to explain conservation of resources of four resources in the environment (soil, water, fuel, wild animals).
Ability to conserve four resources in the environment (soil, water, fuel, wild animals).
Ability to show four aspects of responsibility in conservation of environmental resources (offers leadership, observes safety, shows initiative, shows dutifulness in tasks).
Ability to describe food production processes at household level (direct sowing of seeds, growing of fruits, uses of domestic animals, balanced diet, boiling and shallow frying).
Ability to carry out various food production processes at household level (direct sowing of seeds, growing of fruits, uses of domestic animals, balanced diet, boiling and shallow frying).
Ability to exhibit integrity in carrying out food production processes (utilising resources prudently, is accountable, shows honesty, applies ethically acceptable procedures).
Ability to describe practices that promote hygiene (personal hygiene, domestic hygiene and cleaning personal protective equipment).
Ability to apply health practices to promote hygiene (personal hygiene, domestic hygiene and cleaning personal protective equipment).
Ability to exhibit responsibility while undertaking health practices that promote hygiene (respects other learners’ property, offers leadership, accepts consequences, cares for property).
Ability to use tacking stitches in making an item (makes appropriate choice of stitch, makes the stitch, ensures evenness of the stitch and firmness of stitch to the purpose).
Ability to work in unity in making an item (sharing resources, working in teams, appreciating efforts of others, respects others’ opinions).

Ability to describe functions of external parts of a plant.

Ability to develop a plan of maintaining a healthy human digestive system.

Ability to manage solid waste in the environment.
